reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos aca cuando volvemos de la costa. Muy limpio los baños y buena atención

(Translated by Google)
We always stop here when we're coming back from the coast. The bathrooms are very clean and the service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfbnN1enJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
muchas opciones de comida y rápido para la atención y el servicio en general. tiene una placita atrás para poder descansar  también hay bancos y mesitas . bastante movimiento de gente constantemente

(Translated by Google)
Lots of food options and fast service overall. There's a small plaza in the back where you can rest, and there are also benches and tables. It's constantly busy with people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfeHBpclNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lejos las mejores medialunas de camino a la costa, ATALAYA malisimo

(Translated by Google)
By far the best croissants on the way to the coast, ATALAYA is terrible

reviews.comment:
Recomiendo el pejerrey a la romana, y si de sanwhiches se trata, no escatiman el jamón y el queso. Esto es en Chascomus, provincia de Buenos Aires

(Translated by Google)
I recommend the fried silverside fish, and if you're looking for sandwiches, they don't skimp on the ham and cheese. This is in Chascomús, Buenos Aires province.
